zh.Blagdon, , Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特布拉格頓
zh.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMartin於1200年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布拉格頓。他於1250年與Gwenllian le Mayne在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布拉格頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Blagdon, , Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特布拉格頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMartin于1200年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特布拉格頓。他于1250年与Gwenllian le Mayne在英国英格兰薩默塞特布拉格頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: FitzMartin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, Irish: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Martin , ‘son of Martin’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Martin
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, Flemish, German, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, Italian (Veneto); Spanish (Martín): from a personal name derived from Latin Martinus, itself a derivative of Mars, genitive Martis, the Roman god of fertility and war, whose name may derive ultimately from a root mar ‘gleam’. This was borne by a famous 4th-century Christian saint, Martin of Tours, and consequently became extremely popular throughout Europe in the Middle Ages. In North America, the surname Martin has absorbed cognates and derivatives from other languages, e.g. Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Marcin , Albanian Martini , Polish surnames beginning with Marcin-, and Slovenian patronymics like Martinčič (see Martincic ). Martin is the most frequent surname in France and one of the most frequent surnames in Wallonia.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mártain, ‘descendant of Martin’ (compare 1 above). Otherwise, a shortened form of Gilmartin or McMartin ; sometimes also spelled Martyn.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMartin was born in 1200, in Blagdon, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. He married Gwenllian le Mayne in 1250, in Blagdon, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMartin est né en 1200, à Blagdon, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Gwenllian le Mayne en 1250, à Blagdon, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMartin wurde 1200 in Blagdon, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1250 in Blagdon, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Gwenllian le Mayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMartin è nato il nel 1200 nel Blagdon, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Gwenllian le Mayne nel 1250, nel Blagdon, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Blagdon, , Somerset, England: イギリスイギリスソメルセトブラグドン
ja.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMartinは1200年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブラグドンで生まれた。1250年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブラグドンでGwenllian le Mayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMartin(은)는 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 블래그던에서 태어났다. 그는 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 블래그던에서 Gwenllian le Mayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMartin nasceu em 1200, em Blagdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian le Mayne em 1250, em Blagdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMartin родился в 1200 г. в местности благдон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian le Mayne в 1250 г. в местности благдон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMartin nació en 1200, en Blagdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Gwenllian le Mayne en 1250, en Blagdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo.
